reviews.comment:
Stepping into coffee Island feels like an escape from the busy world outside. The ambiance is simply wonderful warm and inviting, with soft, ambient lighting, Whether you're catching up with a friend or looking for a cozy corner to work, the different seating options cater to every need.

The coffee itself is excellent and clearly made with care.The Cappuccino expertly prepared, with a rich, smooth flavor that was a real treat.

The presentation was lovely as well, & coffee was too good, thanks Azhar a man himself is genuine, & made may day wonderful.
Thanks Azhar.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you! So glad you loved the European coffee experience right where you're at. We’ll keep the brews bold and the vibes just right, see you again soon!

reviews.comment: The place is clean and has nice ambience. I spent 30 mins to take a coffee but conversation with the person taking the order and making the order took me away and I loved it. He made Vietnamese shakerato and was perfect. The location in the mall is also perfect and lots of seating around. When you go next time to the mall stop at this place. They have good descent options of snacking and cakes as well.
